title: Extract turbo_template to standalone GitHub repository with flattened structure
description: Create a new private GitHub repository for turbo_template and populate it with the package's current committed state from the monorepo. This is the most complex extraction because the Flutter app currently lives inside a 'flutter-app/' subdirectory and must be flattened to the repo root. The parent directory contains infrastructure files (Makefile, scripts/, firebase symlink, config, ARCHITECTURE.md, .claude/, .mcp.json) that reference 'flutter-app/' paths — all of which must be updated to reflect the new flat structure where the Flutter app is at root level.
context:
turbo_template is a production Flutter app template (v1.0.0+1, package name turbo_flutter_template) that is NOT published to pub.dev. It currently has this structure in the monorepo:

turbo_template/
  flutter-app/    <- actual Flutter project (lib/, pubspec.yaml, ios/, android/, etc.)
  scripts/        <- Dart CLI tools for project init and template sync
  firebase/       <- SYMLINK to /Users/codaveto/Repos/pew-pew-platform/firebase
  Makefile        <- Firebase deployment, emulators, template sync, build commands
  turbo_template_config.yaml  <- Template bootstrapping configuration
  ARCHITECTURE.md <- Architecture documentation
  .claude/        <- Claude Code commands and skills
  .mcp.json       <- MCP server configuration
  .gitignore      <- Git ignore rules

In the new repo, flutter-app/ contents move to root. scripts/, Makefile, config, ARCHITECTURE.md, .claude/, .mcp.json, .gitignore sit alongside the Flutter app files at root level. The firebase symlink is recreated at root pointing to the same target. Multiple files reference 'flutter-app/' paths that must be updated:
- Makefile: targets use 'cd flutter-app &&' prefixes
- turbo_template_config.yaml: template_path is 'flutter-app'
- scripts/lib/config_reader.dart: default templatePath is 'flutter-app'
- ARCHITECTURE.md: directory tree and path references mention flutter-app/
- Various scripts may reference the flutter-app subdirectory path

The flutter-app/pubspec.yaml uses 'resolution: workspace' which must be removed. All turbo package dependencies use ^version constraints that resolve from pub.dev — these stay unchanged.

before_starting: Update this task's status to 'in-progress' immediately after reading it to prevent other agents from picking it up.
Read the spec file at workspace/specs/monorepo-extraction/package-extraction/extraction-spec.json for full context on decisions and constraints.
Read the existing Makefile, turbo_template_config.yaml, scripts/lib/config_reader.dart, and ARCHITECTURE.md in turbo_template/ to understand all 'flutter-app' path references before making changes.
goals: A private GitHub repository at appboypov/turbo_template exists and contains the flattened app
The Flutter app (lib/, pubspec.yaml, ios/, android/, web/, etc.) is at the repo root — not inside flutter-app/
scripts/, Makefile, turbo_template_config.yaml, ARCHITECTURE.md, .claude/, .mcp.json are at the repo root alongside the Flutter app
firebase/ symlink at repo root points to /Users/codaveto/Repos/pew-pew-platform/firebase
All internal path references to 'flutter-app/' are updated to reflect the flattened structure
The package resolves all dependencies from pub.dev (no workspace resolution)
flutter analyze passes with zero warnings
The repo has been pushed to GitHub with an initial commit
non_goals: Do not set up CI/CD pipelines or GitHub Actions
Do not modify any dependency version constraints
Do not modify any files in the turbo_packages monorepo
Do not carry over git history — this is a clean start
Do not verify Firebase deployment works (the symlink target may not be present on all machines)
Do not run flutter test (the app may have tests that depend on Firebase emulators or other infrastructure)
steps_overview: Create the GitHub repo using 'gh repo create appboypov/turbo_template --private --clone' in ~/Repos/

Copy turbo_template/flutter-app/ contents to the new repo root (this is the Flutter app: lib/, pubspec.yaml, ios/, android/, web/, macos/, linux/, windows/, test/, assets/, etc.), excluding: .dart_tool/, build/, coverage/, .DS_Store, *.iml, .flutter-plugins, .flutter-plugins-dependencies
Copy turbo_template/.gitignore to ~/Repos/turbo_template/ (merge with flutter-app/.gitignore if both exist)
Edit pubspec.yaml: remove the 'resolution: workspace' line
Edit Makefile: remove 'cd flutter-app && ' prefixes from targets (build-assets, fix, dart-fix) and update 'cd flutter-app' references to '.' or remove them
Edit turbo_template_config.yaml: change template_path from 'flutter-app' to '.'
Edit scripts/lib/config_reader.dart: change default templatePath from 'flutter-app' to '.'
Search all scripts/*.dart files for any other 'flutter-app' path references and update them
Edit ARCHITECTURE.md: update directory tree and all path references that mention flutter-app/
Run 'flutter pub get' to verify dependency resolution from pub.dev
Run 'flutter analyze' to verify zero warnings
Stage all files (including the firebase symlink), commit with message 'feat: initial extraction from turbo_packages monorepo', push to main
acceptance_criteria: GitHub repo appboypov/turbo_template exists and is private
Local repo at ~/Repos/turbo_template has the Flutter app at root level (lib/ and pubspec.yaml are in the repo root, NOT inside flutter-app/)
scripts/, Makefile, turbo_template_config.yaml, ARCHITECTURE.md, .claude/, .mcp.json are at repo root
firebase/ symlink exists at repo root and points to /Users/codaveto/Repos/pew-pew-platform/firebase
No file anywhere in the repo contains the path reference 'flutter-app/' (search with grep -r 'flutter-app' to verify, excluding .git/)
flutter pub get resolves successfully without workspace
Main branch is pushed to GitHub with at least one commit
constraints: Do not modify any dependency version constraints — they stay exactly as they are
Do not add any features or files that don't exist in the monorepo
Preserve the .claude/ and .mcp.json configurations exactly as-is
The firebase symlink must use an absolute path to the target
The .gitignore must cover Flutter-specific patterns (it merges the parent .gitignore and flutter-app .gitignore if both exist)

expected_outcomes: flutter pub get and flutter analyze exit with code 0
grep for 'flutter-app' returns zero matches (all references updated)
gh repo view shows visibility: PRIVATE

after_completion: Update this task's status to 'done' and add a worklog entry describing what was done.
Move this task file to workspace/tasks/archive/dev/ using 'mv'.

Check if any open tasks in workspace/tasks/dev/ would benefit from additional context based on what you learned (e.g., additional flutter-app references found in unexpected places, .gitignore merge issues). If so, append context to those tasks without changing their existing content.
